violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floor tiles under the fryers were found missing. Flooring should be properly maintained so it is easily cleaned. Wall behind fryers is showing signs of wear. Wall should be repaired and maintained in good condition.
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
